this_title: รักเต็มร้อย
introduction: Nalin is the daughter of a maid and a married rich man. When she was born, she was kidnapped with her mother by order of her father's wife and taken to the countryside. From now on she only knew poverty, beatings and working for a penny to support her family. Her patience was overwhelmed by her stepfather's attempt to rape her. Nalin asks for help from a woman she worked for and now lives in a boarding school, where she meets Nat. He liked her very much and, when the time came for graduation, he offered her a job as a maid in his uncle's house.All these years her father was looking for Nalin . And now, bit by bit, he finds out that the maid in the house of his acquaintances is his missing daughter, but then misfortune occurs.
foreign_title: รักเต็มร้อย
